creator: freebsd.macgregor@blueyonder.co.uk
text:
Renato Botelho unleashed the infinite monkeys on 12/04/2007 18:16 producing:
> Clamav is using -lthr just for FreeBSD >= 6.x, are you still having these
> problems?

Not currently, but having manually fixed the problem I've not
re-installed the 0.90.1 port.  I'll know for certain when the 0.90.2
port is available.

-- 
 Rob | Oh my God! They killed init! You bastards!
